Strings.String: Installation of the .NET Framework 2.0 SP2 is not supported on Windows 95/98/ME. Contact your application vendor.

Installation of the .NET Framework 2.0 SP2 requires a minimum of one of the following: Windows 2000 Service Pack 4, Windows XP Service Pack 2, Windows Server 2003 Service Pack 1. To upgrade Windows Vista to .NET Frameworks 2.0 SP2 requires the installation of .NET Frameworks 3.5 SP1, available on Microsoft Download Center.
This version of the .NET Framework 2.0 SP2 is not supported on an IA-64 operating system. Contact your application vendor.

This version of the .NET Framework 2.0 SP2 can not be installed on Vista or Windows Server 2008. Install .NET Framework 3.5 SP1, which will upgrade .NET Framework 2.0 to SP2, or contact your application vendor.
Administrator permissions are required to install the .NET Framework 2.0 SP2. Contact your administrator.
Installation of the .NET Framework 2.0 SP2 requires Internet Explorer 5.01 or greater. Contact your application vendor.
The user has cancelled the installation. The .NET Framework 2.0 SP2 has not been installed.
A failure occurred attempting to install the .NET Framework 2.0 SP2.
A failure occurred while downloading .NET Framework 2.0 SP2 package.
